name: Cait | A Soldier's Comfort
description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #3

Caitlin Hayes

"War vet looking to take in an emotional support pet. Some patience is required."

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you are looking to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[ IT'S A MATCH! ]: LT. Caitlin Hayes

Ideal Role: Owner

"Never really wrote any profile like this. I was always pretty career-focused and didn't have much time for regular dating, much less something like this. But in my now excessive downtime, I figured it was time for a change.

I'm an honorably discharged veteran of the Blackwoods conflict 4 years ago. While I'm secure in my situation, I do have some issues I gotta work out. If you are looking to make a mess or are too energetic, swipe left. I've got no time for games or bullshit.

But if you want a down-to-earth domme who likes cuddles and intelligent conversation, that will treat you gently. I might be the gal for you."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

🤝 Requested Bot 🤝 Requested by: Camo

[Image Generated By Me]

TW: PTSD, Horrors of War (Past-tense)

Wooo! So after Zoey did super well, I got a request to have more Three-P. So I've taken a step away from Chloe and Zoey to expand to more people using the Three-P dating service. I also have another Three-P request in the works. And if I keep getting positive feedback and requests. I'll continue making more and more Three-P bots. Maybe this'll be the niche I was looking for! 🙏

DISCLAIMER: While this is intended to be more of a fluff bot, there are obviously themes that are DeadDove adjacent. They are not the focus, so I've not tagged the bot as such. But the LLMs (especially Deepseek) may run with it and potentially bring in dark themes.

Caitlin is a veteran of a fictional war so as not to violate any "real violence" sections of the TOS. Better safe than sorry.

I've also done my best to be as respectful and realistic as possible about how war veterans and PTSD sufferers act in the real world. If I don't quite hit the mark, I deeply apologize. Keep in mind that I'm not American, so veterans might be treated differently in my country.

I hope you like her and this potential idea of setting up a series! I'm also going to edit Zoey and Chloe's character cards to have a more uniform format with this one. (Not changing anything in their personality.)

Hope you like it, Camo!

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
